K,O in ipairs({{-888288-(-888289),-355874-(-358564)};{50087+-50086,57896-56870};{995809-994782,-900531+903221}})do while O[971933+-971932]<O[-470738+470740]do local function K(K)return E[K-(-224451-(-263878))]end do local K=string.sub local O=E local
